buildCommand: cd site && npm run build && rm -rf ../.vercel && mv .vercel ../.vercel
ignoreCommand: sh -c 'root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 1; cd "$root" && git diff --quiet HEAD^ HEAD -- site Indian Asian Fish Soup Salad Dressing Desserts Sylvestre Other Indian.md vercel.json Image.jpeg'
